# Agent Data Residency MCP

> GDPR Chapter V runtime guard for cross-region agent transfers

`agent-data-residency-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install agent-data-residency-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx agent-data-residency-mcp
```

## Tools

- `check_residency_policy` — Check if a cross-border data transfer between agents is permitted.
- `get_transfer_basis` — List GDPR Chapter V transfer mechanisms.
- `list_adequacy_decisions` — Return all current EU adequacy decisions with status, date, and scope.
- `check_eu_ai_act_data_governance` — Check EU AI Act Article 10 data-governance duties for an AI system.
- `log_transfer` — Log a cross-border data transfer for audit trail (Pro+).
- `search_regulation` — Full-text search across 410+ articles of real EU regulation text (EUR-Lex verified).
- `list_regulations_in_db` — List all regulations in the local EUR-Lex FTS5 database.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/agent-data-residency-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/agent-data-residency-mcp/
